# LrGeniusAI

LrGeniusAI is a free, open-source (AGPL-3.0) AI workflow plugin for Adobe Lightroom Classic.
Maintained by Bastian Machek (Fokuspunk). GitHub org: https://github.com/LrGenius

## Key Facts

- **License:** AGPL-3.0 — completely free, no subscription, no usage limits
- **Platforms:** macOS and Windows
- **Requires:** Adobe Lightroom Classic (not Lightroom CC)
- **Status:** Beta / active development (installers not yet code-signed)
- **Runs 100% locally** with Ollama or LM Studio — photos never leave your computer
- **Optional cloud AI:** OpenAI/ChatGPT, Google Gemini, Google Vertex AI

## Features

- AI keyword generation (open-vocabulary, prompt-tunable)
- AI captions, titles, and alt-text for photos
- Semantic free-text search across your entire Lightroom library
- AI-powered photo culling with face-aware selection (beta)
- Face recognition and People management dialog
- Smart editing recipes ("Looks") trained on your personal editing style (beta)
- Keyword deduplication and de-clutter

## Supported AI Providers

| Provider | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Ollama | Local | 100% private, free, runs on your hardware |
| LM Studio | Local | 100% private, free, runs on your hardware |
| OpenAI / ChatGPT | Cloud | Requires API key, billed by OpenAI |
| Google Gemini | Cloud | Requires API key, billed by Google |
| Google Vertex AI | Cloud | Requires GCP project, billed by Google |

- Home: https://lrgenius.com
